title: Uniface Name
text: Uniface Name Name of the Uniface field or entity to which the DTD item is mapped to. Read-only. This field is not displayed if the DTD item does not map to a field or entity. For example, the root node of a DTD tree does not represent a field or entity, so the Uniface Name field is not displayed when renaming the root node. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
